task_completion.description: Navigate to the acme-worker-service project directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal prompt, 'pwd', or 'ls' output showing the agent is working inside '/home/ga/projects/acme-worker-service'.

task_completion.description: Investigate the crash-looping container to identify the issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing commands like 'docker ps' (revealing a 'Restarting' status for acme-worker), 'docker logs acme-worker', or 'docker stats' indicating memory issues or crashes.

task_completion.description: Modify docker-compose.yml to tune the application configuration parameter controlling memory usage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim) or 'cat' output showing 'docker-compose.yml' where the environment variable 'MAX_ALLOCATION_MB' has been changed to 250 or a lower value.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Docker container memory limit is not increased above 300MB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'docker-compose.yml' file clearly shows the Docker memory limit constraint (e.g., 'mem_limit: 300M' or under 'deploy.resources') remains exactly at 300M.

task_completion.description: Restart the service and verify it runs safely within the memory limit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'docker-compose up -d' followed by 'docker ps' where the 'acme-worker' container has a status of 'Up' for a sustained period, or logs showing stable operation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually modified and saved the docker-compose.yml file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for text editor save confirmations, successful 'sed' commands, or a final 'cat docker-compose.yml' that proves the file on disk was updated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent restarted the Docker container to apply the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal showing execution of 'docker-compose down' and 'docker-compose up -d', 'docker-compose up --force-recreate', or 'docker restart acme-worker'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not cheat by removing the Docker memory limit entirely.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'docker-compose.yml' file must still contain the 300M memory limit directive; it should not be deleted or commented out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/projects/acme-worker-service. Container name: acme-worker. The application configuration parameter controlling memory is 'MAX_ALLOCATION_MB'. To pass, MAX_ALLOCATION_MB must be set to <= 250 in docker-compose.yml. The Docker memory limit must remain exactly 300M (or 300MB). The container must be running stably after the changes.
